title: DC Jewellers wins big in best of Mossel Bay 2025
description: BUSINESS NEWS - DC Jewellers is proud to...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - DC Jewellers is proud to announce its double win in the 2025 Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards - taking top honours as both Best Jeweller and Best Jewellery Store.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - DC Jewellers is proud to announce its double win in the 2025 Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards - taking top honours as both Best Jeweller and Best Jewellery Store."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This recognition is deeply meaningful, not just as a celebration of our craft, but as a reflection of the relationships we’ve built across the Southern Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Since 1997, our mission has remained the same: to walk alongside our clients through life’s most treasured moments. From custom engagement rings to heirloom restorations, every piece we create is a testament to trust, care, and timeless design. But beyond the gold and gemstones, it’s the people who matter most.","html":"Since 1997, our mission has remained the same: to walk alongside our clients through life’s most treasured moments. From custom engagement rings to heirloom restorations, every piece we create is a testament to trust, care, and timeless design. But beyond the gold and gemstones, it’s the people who matter most."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We’re honoured to be part of this vibrant community - from Mossel Bay to George, Knysna, and Oudtshoorn - and grateful for the continued support that makes our work so rewarding. Your votes, visits, and kind words remind us why we do what we do.","html":"We’re honoured to be part of this vibrant community - from Mossel Bay to George, Knysna, and Oudtshoorn - and grateful for the continued support that makes our work so rewarding. Your votes, visits, and kind words remind us why we do what we do."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you for letting us craft your memories. We look forward to many more years of shared stories, sparkling milestones, and lasting connections.","html":"Thank you for letting us craft your memories. We look forward to many more years of shared stories, sparkling milestones, and lasting connections."},{"type":"list","items":["Shop 31 - Bayview Centre - Da Nova","044 – 691 3692","www.dcjewellers.co.za"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: DC Jewellers wins big in best of Mossel Bay 2025
